heading: Funding
label: 239l–3 Funding
text: Beginning with fiscal year 2010, the Secretary shall transfer from the Public Health and Social Services Emergency Fund such sums as may be necessary to carry out this part.
notes: Transfer of Appropriated Funds, , , provided that:Pub. L. 112–10, div. B, title VIII, § 1828125 Stat. 162Apr. 15, 2011“Hereafter, no funds appropriated by this division or by any previous or subsequent Act shall be available for transfer under section 274 [–3] of the PHS Act [Public Health Service Act].”42 U.S.C. 239l
